title: missing.jar (Discontinued)
description:
Beware he lurks around the world.

Always watch your back.
body:
I see you

Your world is corrupted and there is someone watching you. Mod is discontinued. I am working on a new horror mod.
[https://modrinth.com/mod/version-666](https://modrinth.com/mod/version-666)

What mod offers and what it can do

There is currently 3 entities in the mod and 1 dimension to be found. Mod can change the time in your world, play sounds and spawn entities but nothing bad. Mod can be played both in singleplayer and multiplayer.
Mod is currently new and will have new stuff added as time goes on
Brought to you by Cool modz. Original mod
